settings.heading: NRI & Diaspora Event Trophies from India
settings.subheading: Indian-crafted trophies, medals and mementos for diaspora associations, cultural galas, cricket leagues and temple events abroad — custom-engraved and shipped worldwide from Bangalore. By Meru Trophy.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy makes custom trophies, medals and mementos for NRI and diaspora events — cultural galas, cricket leagues, temple and community awards — engraved (incl. Indian-language scripts) and shipped worldwide from Bangalore at great value. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252. See our feeds hub and country pages.

settings.heading: Awards built for NRI & diaspora events
settings.text: Diaspora associations, cricket leagues, temple trusts and cultural groups abroad order Indian-crafted awards for Diwali galas, Navratri competitions, community felicitations and tournaments. We offer significantly better value than local suppliers for handcrafted crystal and metal awards, custom engraving in English and Indian-language scripts, and worldwide shipping with customs documentation.

settings.title: Great value from India
settings.text: Handcrafted awards well below overseas retail.

settings.title: Indian-language engraving
settings.text: English, Hindi, Gujarati, Tamil, Telugu and more.

settings.title: All event types
settings.text: Cultural galas, cricket leagues, temple & community awards.

settings.question: Do you ship outside India?
settings.answer: Yes — worldwide, with commercial invoice and customs documentation.

settings.question: Can you engrave in Indian languages?
settings.answer: Yes — English plus Hindi, Gujarati, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam, Punjabi and more.

settings.question: Is it cheaper than buying locally abroad?
settings.answer: Usually yes — Indian-crafted crystal and metal awards offer strong value even after shipping.

settings.question: How do we pay from abroad?
settings.answer: Bank transfer (SWIFT), Wise and other options — ask on WhatsApp.

settings.heading: Need awards for NRI & diaspora events?
settings.text: Tell us your requirement and date — we'll share relevant past work and a quote, usually within the hour.
